ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has been shipped! Order Confirmation
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #1234567890 has been shipped and is on its way to you.

Order details:
- 1 x Echo Dot (4th Gen) – ₹ 3,999
- 1 x Kindle Paperwhite – ₹ 6,999

Total: ₹ 10,998

Track your order here: <URL>

Thank you for choosing Amazon. If you have any queries, feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Income Tax Department – Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Rahul,

We hope you are doing well. As part of the annual refund process, we have processed your income tax refund of ₹ 25,000.00. However, the refund is pending verification.

To ensure a smooth transfer, please click the link below and provide the required details within 48 hours:

<URL>

If you do not verify your refund within the stipulated time, your account will be temporarily suspended and you may lose the refund amount. This is a mandatory step to comply with the latest government regulations.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department (Delhi Office)

Note: This email is being sent from a monitored inbox. Do not reply to this email. For any assistance, call the official helpline at 1800-123-456.
